arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye bid for Wharton; Real Madrid's plan to sign Alexander-Arnold revealed
arts.sum: Barcelona and Atletico Madrid are interested in signing Thomas Partey once his contract expires in summer 2025. Arsenal are plotting a move for 18-year-old Barcelona starlet Arnau Pradas .

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Manchester United predictions: Villa to pile the misery on Red Devils
arts.sum: - Aston Villa have won six of their last seven games across all competitions- Manchester United have lost three of their opening six league games- Recommended Bet: Aston Villa to win

arts.ttl: Simone Inzaghi’s Manchester United move ‘considered impossible’
arts.sum: Serie A giants Inter’s boss Simone Inzaghi has been linked with a move to Manchester United in recent days but it doesn’t seem as if the move will take off…

arts.ttl: Romelu Lukaku makes huge prediction about 'lethal' Scott McTominay at Napoli as striker blown away by old Man Utd pal
arts.sum: The 27-year-old netted his second goal for the Italian outfit and his former Old Trafford team-mate has been well impressed

arts.ttl: Man United 'eyeing £38m Spanish defender' who Erik ten Hag previously snubbed
arts.sum: Manchester United could allegedly move for Aston Villa centre-back Pau Torres during next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa U21s vs Newcastle U21s LIVE updates as Tyrone Mings and Boubacar Kamara feature
arts.sum: Mings hasn't featured for Villa in nearly 14 months after sustaining his serious knee injury in Villa's opening weekend defeat to Newcastle in 2023/24. Villa's U21s are managed by Josep Gombau and have won two of their opening five Premier League 2 games this season and sit 17th in the 26-team divison.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes 'shocked' Man Utd let youngster leave in transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester United enjoyed a very busy transfer window this summer and club captain Bruno Fernandes was "shocked" by the decision to sell one talented young prospect

arts.ttl: Man United 'will rekindle talks' with Champions League winner if Erik ten Hag is sacked
arts.sum: Manchester United will reignite discussions with Thomas Tuchel should the club decide to sack Erik ten Hag as head coach, according to a report.

arts.ttl: How Erik ten Hag's analyst son could play a pivotal role in his dad's Old Trafford downfall with Manchester United staff worried about his influence on transfers
arts.sum: Oh, to be Erik ten Hag for just one day. Driving into Manchester United 's Carrington training base under a microscope of scrutiny that has been present since he stepped into the role.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund gives Man Utd fans two-word instruction after backlash to message
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund copped criticism from some fans for a post he put on social media following Manchester United's draw in Porto as he issued a response to those supporters
